rules.name: MALWARE-CNC Trojan outbound connection
rules.author: Cisco Talos
rules.content: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"MALWARE-CNC Trojan outbound connection"; flow:to_server,established; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"/gate.php"; http_uri; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:1000001; rev:4;)

rules.name: EXPLOIT-KIT landing page
rules.author: Cisco Talos
rules.content: alert tcp $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"EXPLOIT-KIT landing page detected"; flow:to_client,established; content:"applet"; nocase; content:"archive"; nocase; classtype:attempted-user; sid:1000002; rev:2;)
